description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Artifacts (Package) that triggers on push, pull request, and workflow dispatch events. Run two parallel jobs on ubuntu-20.04, one for mingw-w64 and one for steamrt-sniper in a container. For each job, check out the code with submodules, set up a problem matcher, build a release using a custom script, and upload the resulting artifacts with a version name derived from the GitHub reference and SHA.
